name: UBA : Potentially Compromised Account
notes: Detects a potentially compromised account by checking for initial risky access, suspicious activity, then exfiltration.
conditions_text: when UBA : Suspicious Activity Followed by Exfiltration match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after UBA : Initial Access Followed by Suspicious Activity match
thresholds: when UBA : Suspicious Activity Followed by Exfiltration match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after UBA : Initial Access Followed by Suspicious Activity match
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Potentially Compromised Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when UBA : Suspicious Activity Followed by Exfiltration match at least 1 times with the same Username in 24 hour(s) after UBA : Initial Access Followed by Suspicious Activity match
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Potentially Compromised Account
